positive.prompt: Create a handoff document so a fresh agent can continue this conversation tomorrow
Summarize our current work for another agent session, redact secrets, and save it outside this repository
I need a continuation summary with the next steps and suggested skills for the next session

negative.prompt: Turn the current requirements into an implementation plan with ordered tasks
Initialize the target repository's durable project memory documentation

evals.prompt: Prepare a handoff for a new agent session that will finish the login bug. We have already updated docs/spec.md and changed src/auth.ts. Tests have not been run. Save the document outside this workspace, do not paste our API token into it, and recommend the best next workflow.
evals.expected_output: A concise, redacted temporary handoff document that names the next-session goal, references existing artifacts, records unverified tests, and recommends an available skill.
expectations: The agent writes one Markdown handoff document in the host operating system's temporary directory rather than the workspace
The handoff references docs/spec.md and src/auth.ts instead of duplicating their contents
The handoff records that tests have not been run without claiming they passed
The handoff excludes the API token and includes a mandatory Suggested skills section
The response returns the handoff's absolute path and a concise next-session focus
